prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Toyota 2GR-FKS** (3.5L V6, 310hp stock) with a **Tomei 2GR-FKS stroker kit** (3.7L displacement) and **HKS GT-SS turbocharger** (single-turbo conversion, 1.0 bar boost, targeting 500whp on E85), paired with a **Koyoritsu 6-speed manual transmission** (from the Lexus IS F) and **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** for traction.

Full **Radium Engineering fuel system** with dual **ID1050x injectors**, **Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump**, and **AEM 320LPH external pump** to support E85 tuning, alongside a **GReddy Profec B Spec II standalone ECU** with **Link G4+ Xtreme** piggyback for precise ignition and boost control.

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom valved for the Traviq’s 1,500kg curb weight), **Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable)** and **rear sway bar (22mm)**, **SuperPro poly bushings (full kit)**, and **DBA 5000 Series rotors** with **Project Mu 999.9 pads** for aggressive braking.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB Works Traviq widebody kit** (custom-fabricated to fit the 7-seater chassis) with **Rocket Bunny-style overfenders**, **Voltex Type-5 rear wing** (carbon fiber, 1,200mm span), and **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (with functional vents for the 2GR-FKS turbo setup).

**Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +38 front / 18x10.5 +45 rear wheels** wrapped in **Yokohama Advan A052 245/40/18 and 275/35/18 tires**, paired with **D2 Racing extended wheel studs (M12x1.5)** and **Muteki SR45 lug nuts** for aggressive fitment.

**Full custom interior** with **Recaro Pole Position seats (front row)**, **Sparco 6-point harnesses**, **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede)**, **Defi BF gauges (oil temp, boost, AFR) mounted on a **Custom Cages A-pillar pod**, and **Soundstream REF-9.2000D 2000W amplifier** with **Focal Utopia Be 6.5" components** for audio.
